leadText: Electro Drift (Japanese: イナズマドライブ Lightning Drive) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Miraidon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Electro Drift inflicts damage. If the move is super effective on the target, its damage is increased by roughly 33% (or more precisely, by a factor of 5461/4096).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.
